mapper.select:
SELECT cr.*, s.chinese_name AS studentName, s.student_no AS studentNo, grade.grade_group_name AS gradeName, c.class_name AS className FROM competition_record cr LEFT JOIN student_info s ON cr.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_class c ON cr.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN grade_group grade ON grade.id = c.grade_group
cr.deleted = 0
AND cr.competition_id = #{reqModel.competitionId}
AND s.chinese_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reqModel.studentName}, '%')
AND c.class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reqModel.className}, '%')
ORDER BY cr.id DESC

SELECT cr.id AS id, ci.school_id AS schoolId, ci.competition_name AS competitionName, ci.start_date AS startDate, ci.end_date AS endDate, ci.organizer AS organizer, ci.location AS location, ci.school_year AS schoolYear, cr.award AS award, cr.merit_big AS meritBig, cr.merit_small AS meritSmall, cr.merit_advantage AS meritAdvantage, cr.demerit_big AS demeritBig, cr.demerit_small AS demeritSmall, cr.demerit_shortcoming AS demeritShortcoming FROM competition_record cr LEFT JOIN competition_info ci ON cr.competition_id = ci.id LEFT JOIN student_info s ON cr.student_id = s.id
cr.deleted = 0
AND cr.student_id = #{reqModel.studentId}
ORDER BY cr.id DESC

select cr.student_id as studentId, sum(cr.merit_big) as meritBig, sum(cr.merit_small) as meritSmall, sum(cr.merit_advantage) as meritAdvantage, sum(cr.demerit_big) as demeritBig, sum(cr.demerit_small) as demeritSmall, sum(cr.demerit_shortcoming) as demeritShortcoming from competition_record cr left join competition_info ci on cr.competition_id = ci.id where cr.deleted = 0 and cr.class_id = #{classId} and ci.start_date between #{semesterStart} and #{semesterEnd} group by cr.student_id
